summary: v3 changes verified end-to-end. Backend: 18 passed / 1 skipped (skip is environmental — tent at capacity, duplicate-plant flow exercised inside max_plants_limit). Frontend: SimpleUI level segments (no numbers), inline notifications, Add Plant dialog with all 6 catalog items selectable (no alreadyPlanted disable), Control Panel light/fan toggles + pH pump up/down with 5-segment indicator all functional. AI drawer opens with voice mic button, model selector, chat input/send, and Claude responses working.

minor.issue: Dedup verified for low_water/low_nutrients (v3 fix confirmed).

issues: Stale 'Recently Harvested' chips from previous test runs (TEST_HarvestBasil, TEST_Lettuce x2) clutter the UI - cleanup not part of any auto-prune; cosmetic only
Copy still inconsistent: Control Panel says 'Water level is low! Refill soon.' vs My Tent inline 'Water level is low — refill needed' (carry-over from v2)

critical_code_review_comments: v3 dedup for low_water/low_nutrients now in place and tested - resolves the v2 review comment.

TentStatus model cleanly migrated from light_hours/fan_speed to light_on/fan_on/ph_pump_level. POST /api/plants has no per-catalog-id uniqueness check (good - aligns with 'allow duplicates' requirement); only MAX_PLANTS=6 is enforced.

AIAssistant.jsx: VideoAnswerExample only renders when chatHistory is empty AND showVideoExample is true - both quick suggestions and the video example are hidden once a user sends a message OR if there's prior history. This matches the spec ('first-time users') but means a returning user with old history will never see them again. Consider showing them on a 'Clear chat / Start over' affordance.

Web Speech API: voice button is present; graceful degradation via toast when recognitionRef.current is null (browsers without webkitSpeechRecognition). Could not exercise actual speech in headless Playwright as expected.
server.py is 469 lines (under 700). MongoDB _id excluded everywhere. Env vars used correctly.
seed_data_creation: TestPlants test class creates/deletes TEST_-prefixed plants idempotently. After this run 5 growing plants remain (Mint, Spinach, Basil, Tomato, Lettuce) plus a TEST_Lettuce as plant_id placeholder if created. Recently-Harvested chips include 3 TEST_-prefixed leftovers from previous iterations (cosmetic, not auto-pruned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: v3 schema: TentStatus has light_on (bool), fan_on (bool), ph_pump_level (int 0-5). Old fields light_hours/fan_speed are gone - any test referring to them will 422. Notifications dedup is active for low_water/low_nutrients (only one unread per type). The duplicate-plant test in TestPlants will skip when tent has >4 growing plants - this is expected; the underlying duplicate behavior is also covered implicitly by test_max_plants_limit which adds the same catalog ids repeatedly. AI drawer's video example + quick suggestions only render when chatHistory is empty (DB has prior chats from previous iterations).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All requested v3 behaviors verified at backend (status codes + persisted values) and frontend (UI elements, toggles, click handlers). Voice input requires HTTPS + browser SpeechRecognition support; presence of data-testid='voice-input-btn' verified.
